g.text: Auditor test–retest stability (5 papers × 10 sealed repeats, frozen code, fixed model/prompt/temperature)

text.style: fill: #767676; font: 8.2px 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: middle

g.text: Overall mean detection rate 0.38: a typical canonical issue appears in only ~4 of 10 repeats — count is stable, issue identity is not. Merged-by-defect matcher (upper bound); n=5, a characterisation, not a population estimate.
